headline: A Look At NRG Energy (NRG) Valuation After Discounted Secondary Offering And Leadership Uncertainty
summary: NRG Energy (NRG) is back in focus after a discounted March secondary offering of 14.3 million shares by LS Power affiliates, together with insider selling ahead of an upcoming CEO transition. See our latest analysis for NRG Energy. Despite pressure from the discounted secondary offering and leadership uncertainty, NRG’s 1 year total shareholder return of 66.63% and very large 3 year total shareholder return contrast with a recent 30 day share price return of 5.78% and 90 day share price...
